description_long: This is a vintage-style double-decker trolleybus, painted primarily in green with cream and gold accents. The lower deck features an enclosed passenger area with red cushioned seats, while the upper deck is open-air with wooden benches and a protective roof supported by metal posts. Decorative latticework and railings surround the upper deck, and a staircase at the rear provides access between levels. The front of the vehicle has a classic, rounded engine compartment and large, spoked wheels with red and white hubcaps. Signage on the sides reads 'DISNEYLAND TRANSPORTATION CO.' and lists destinations such as 'TOWN SQUARE, PLAZA, MAIN STREET, FANTASYLAND.' The overall design evokes early 20th-century public transport vehicles, with visible details such as headlamps, handrails, and a canopy roof.
description: A vintage double-decker green trolleybus with open upper deck, ornate railings, and classic rounded front. Features include a rear staircase, red cushioned seats, and detailed signage.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the rounded engine compartment, front wheels, and enclosed lower deck with visible red seats.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the staircase to the open upper deck and the rear wheels.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the staircase, upper deck benches, and decorative railings.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the engine compartment, front wheels, and side signage.
